debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

failed_attempts:
simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach, ← List.count_eq_countP,
    List.sum_toFinset_count, edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [length, darts, *]

rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount]
  have : ∀ e, List.countP (· = e) (edges p) = Multiset.count e (edges p) := fun e ↦ by
    rw [List.count_eq_countP, ← Multiset.coe_count]; simp [beq_iff_eq]
  simp only [this, ← Multiset.toFinset_coe, ← Multiset.card_eq_sum_count, Multiset.coe_card]
  induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

have h : p.edges.length = p.length := by induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]
  rw [← h, Finset.sum_attach]
  simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount, List.countP_eq_count]
  exact List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length p.edges

simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount, Finset.sum_coe_sort]
  simp_rw [← List.count_eq_countP]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length, edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [darts, length, *]

have h_len : (edges p).length = p.length := by induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]
  simp [edgeSet, edgeCount, Finset.sum_attach, List.count_eq_countP, List.sum_toFinset_count, h_len]

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, List.countP_eq_count, Finset.sum_attach]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count]
  induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet]
  rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  have : ∀ x, countP (· = x) p.edges = p.edges.count x := fun x ↦ by
    rw [List.count_eq_countP]; congr; ext; apply eq_comm
  simp only [this]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count]
  induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

simp only [edgeCount, List.countP_eq_count, edgeSet]
  rw [Finset.sum_attach, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]
  induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, List.countP_eq_count]
  rw [← Multiset.card_eq_sum_count, Multiset.coe_card]
  induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]

have : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [this, edgeSet]
  simp only [edgeCount, List.countP_eq_count]
  rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  exact List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length p.edges

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, ← List.count_eq_countP]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count]
  simp only [edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [darts, length, *]

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach]
  trans (edges p).length
  · rw [List.length_eq_sum_count]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro e _
    rw [List.count_eq_countP]
    congr; funext; simp [eq_comm]
  · simp only [edges, List.length_map]
    induction p <;> simp [darts, length, *]

simp [edgeCount, edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach, List.countP_eq_count]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length, edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [darts, length, *]

simp only [edgeCount, edgeSet, List.countP_eq_count, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]
  simp only [edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [length, darts, *]

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  simp [h, edgeSet, edgeCount, Finset.sum_attach, List.countP_eq_count,
    Multiset.toFinset_sum_count_eq_card, List.toFinset_coe]

simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount]
  rw [← List.count_eq_countP]
  have : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts]
  rw [this, ← Multiset.coe_card, Multiset.card_eq_sum_count, Finset.sum_attach]
  rfl

simp only [edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach]
  trans (edges p).length
  · rw [← List.sum_toFinset_count]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro e _
    rw [edgeCount, List.count_eq_countP]
    congr; funext; rw [eq_comm]
  · simp only [edges, List.length_map]
    induction p <;> simp [*, length, darts]

simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount, Finset.sum_attach]
  have : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    simp only [edges, List.length_map]
    induction p <;> simp [length, darts, *]
  rw [this]
  generalize p.edges = l
  induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a l ih =>
    simp only [List.length_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    conv in (List.countP _ _) => rw [List.countP_cons]
    rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_ite_eq]
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert_self, if_true]
    congr
    by_cases h : a ∈ l.toFinset
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h, ih]
    · rw [Finset.sum_insert h, ih, List.countP_eq_zero.mpr]
      · simp
      · intro y hy; rw [List.mem_toFinset] at h; rintro rfl; contradiction

rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  simp_rw [edgeCount, ← List.count_eq_countP]
  rw [List.sum_toFinset_count]
  induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]

have h_len : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    simp only [edges, List.length_map]
    induction p <;> simp [length, darts, *]
  rw [h_len, edgeSet, ← List.sum_toFinset_count p.edges]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro e _
  simp [edgeCount, List.count_eq_countP]

have : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [this, edgeSet, edgeCount]; generalize p.edges = l
  induction l with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a l ih =>
    simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    by_cases h : a ∈ l.toFinset
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h, ih, add_comm]
      apply Finset.sum_eq_single a <;> simp [h] <;> intros <;> simp_all
    · rw [Finset.sum_insert h, ih, List.countP_eq_zero.2 (mt List.mem_toFinset.1 h), zero_add, add_comm]
      apply Finset.sum_eq_single a <;> simp <;> intros <;> simp_all

have h_len : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [h_len, edgeSet]
  rw [← Multiset.coe_card, ← Multiset.toFinset_sum_count_eq_card]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro e _
  rw [edgeCount, Multiset.count_coe, count_eq_countP]
  apply countP_congr
  intro x _
  simp [eq_comm]

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    simp only [edges, darts, length]
    induction p <;> simp [*]
  rw [h, edgeSet]
  simp only [edgeCount]
  rw [← Multiset.coe_card, Multiset.card_eq_sum_count]

rw [← Finset.sum_attach]
  have h_count : ∀ e, edgeCount p e = p.edges.count e := by
    intro e
    simp [edgeCount, List.count, beq_iff_eq]
  simp only [edgeSet, h_count, ← Multiset.coe_count, ← Multiset.toFinset_coe]
  rw [← Multiset.card_eq_sum_count, Multiset.coe_card]
  simp only [edges, List.length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [darts, length, *]

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [h, edgeSet, edgeCount, ← Multiset.coe_card, ← Multiset.toFinset_sum_count_eq_card]
  simp

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [h, edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach]
  trans ∑ e in p.edges.toFinset, p.edges.count e
  · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro e _
    simp [edgeCount, List.count_eq_countP]
  · rw [← Multiset.coe_card, ← Multiset.coe_toFinset, Multiset.card_eq_sum_count]

rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  simp_rw [edgeCount, List.countP_eq_count, ← Multiset.count_coe]
  rw [edgeSet, ← Multiset.toFinset_coe, Multiset.sum_toFinset_count,
    Multiset.coe_card, edges, length_map]
  induction p <;> simp [length, darts, *]

trans p.edges.length
  · simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount]
    convert List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length p.edges
    ext e
    simp [List.count_eq_countP, BEq.beq_iff_eq]
  · induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

have h_len : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  rw [h_len, edgeSet, Finset.sum_attach]
  simp [edgeCount, List.countP_eq_count, ← Multiset.coe_card, Multiset.card_eq_sum_count]

rw [show p.length = p.edges.length by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]]
  unfold edgeSet edgeCount
  rw [Finset.sum_attach]
  simp_rw [← List.count_eq_countP]

simp only [edgeSet, edgeCount, countP_eq_count, ← Multiset.coe_count, ← Multiset.toFinset_coe,

  induction p <;> simp [darts, length]
